summary: No architectural drift after packet 18. All 15 API contracts, schema (6 tables), CSS design system (43 properties), and heatmap implementation (endpoint + component) match the intended architecture. Heatmap correctly defined but not rendered (wiring is packet 21). 371/371 tests pass. Only carryover findings from prior audits (9 untracked test files, is_valid_repo utility not yet integrated, 2 trivial #fff values).
notes: Packet 18 (Analytics: Heatmap) landed cleanly. GET /api/analytics/heatmap endpoint uses SUM(commits) GROUP BY date with days filter (default 365), sorted ASC. Heatmap React component renders 52x7 CSS grid with 5-level blue color scale matching spec §5.6. Tooltip positioning fix (data-heatmap-root attr) from validation is in place with regression guard. No scope creep into packets 19-23. Tracker state (packet_status.json, packet_status.md, drift_audit_state.json, full_suite_state.json) is consistent. Carryover findings unchanged: 9 untracked test files (operator VCS hygiene, worsened by +1), is_valid_repo tested but not in production path (available for packet 22), 2 #fff hardcoded values, last_quick_scan_at never written (spec slot), 2 transparent CSS border tokens (design intent), last_commit_hash extra field (additive).
